Business Overview:

Company provides warehousing and logistics services in Chhattisgarh. It has Clean & Temperature controlled warehouses, equipped with advanced Safety & Security equipment for complete vigilance for the storage of goods & Medicines. It provides CFA & Logistics services in Central & Eastern India.
